content:
# Project Status вҖ” Knowledge Base

<!-- Reset at extraction (2026-06-05). The parent project's knowledge base
     concerned lanes outside this subproject's scope. The review agent
     rebuilds this file from this subproject's own sessions. -->

## Knowledge Base

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)

- **FBC RE-SCOPE: algebra-level base-change cocycle via `extendScalarsComp` + ONE `eqToIso` (iter-031,
  sorry-free cold-green, axiom-clean).** To identify the two bracketings of a triple `extendScalars`
  composite over a commuting `CommRingCat` square (the (b2) reassociation
  `(R'вҠ—B)вҠ—_{RвҠ—B}((RвҠ—B)вҠ—_R M) вү… (R'вҠ—B)вҠ—_{R'}(R'вҠ—_R M)`), stay ENTIRELY on `ModuleCat` carriers:
  `exact ((ModuleCat.extendScalarsComp inclR.hom ПҒB.hom).app M).symm вүӘвү« eqToIso (by rw [hRing]) вүӘвү«
  (ModuleCat.extendScalarsComp ПҒ.hom inclR'.hom).app M`, where `hRing : ПҒB.hom.comp inclR.hom =
  inclR'.hom.comp ПҒ.hom` is the square at `CommRingCat.Hom.hom` level (`rw [вҶҗ CommRingCat.hom_comp,
  вҶҗ CommRingCat.hom_comp]; exact congrArg CommRingCat.Hom.hom <ring_square>`). `extendScalarsComp` is
  the composition coherence of `moduleCatExtendScalarsPseudofunctor`; the single `eqToIso` is the
  unavoidable transport along the square (lean-auditor: SOUND, not a defeq fudge). **No sheafification,
  no pullback functor вҮ’ the `О“(pullbackComp)` whnf that walls the geometric/mate/concrete/element
  routes NEVER forms** вҖ” this is the whole point of the re-scope and it works first-try. Decl
  `chartBaseChange_extendScalars_cocycle` (FlatBaseChange.lean ~L2581). The crux realization
  `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural_extendScalarsCocycle` (~L2634, typed-sorry scaffold,
  statement = crux conclusion verbatim) consumes it after per-leg single-map `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso`
  rewrites (NEVER compose two `Spec`-pullbacks) + single `tilde` distribution (`Functor.map_comp`) вҖ”
  iter-032 fill; that fill then retargets the crux body off the dead `_mate_glue`. Blueprint prose says
  "natively via cancelBaseChange/IsBaseChange rather than eqToIso" вҖ” optional polish, NOT needed (iso
  already sorry-free); reconcile prose.
- **SNAP lax-monoidal KEYSTONE: `О“` lax monoidal = `(adjunction).rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`, but it REQUIRES
  `MonoidalCategory X.Modules` (iter-030, DECISIVE вҖ” corrects the "W.IsMonoidal is a wall" premise).**
  `rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`'s `F.OplaxMonoidal` target must be monoidal вҮ’ the `LocalizedMonoidal X.Modules`
  synonym is a PREREQUISITE, not a fallback вҖ” and it was ALREADY built in-file (`W_isMonoidal`,
  `modulesLocalizedMonoidal`, `tensorObjLocalizedIso`, `localizedMonoidalUnitIso`, `oplaxMonoidal_Оҙ_eq`, all
  axiom-clean). Recipe (SectionGradedRing.lean ~L1473вҖ“1718, all axiom `{propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound}`):
  `localizedSheafification := Localization.Monoidal.toMonoidalCategory sheafification (Wsheaf X) Оө` (defeq to
  `sheafification`, gets the `.Monoidal` instance); `toPresheafLocalized := toPresheafOfModules X` retyped out
  of the synonym (defeq `X.Modules`); `localizedSheafificationAdjunction := sheafificationAdjunction (рқҹҷ вҖҰ)`
  retyped (accepted by defeq); KEYSTONE `toPresheafLocalized_laxMonoidal := (вҖҰAdjunction).rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`.
  Henceforth the pentagon/triangle/hexagon for `О№` are the LIBRARY lax laws вҖ” no hand object coherence.
  **GATE (`sectionsMul_eq_laxTensorator`):** the tensorator is NOT defeq `sectionsMul` вҖ” `Ој_О“|_вҠӨ = sectionsMul
  вү« О“((tensorObjLocalizedIso F G).hom)`. Prove by unfolding to `homEquiv (Оҙ вү« (ОөвҠ—Оө))`, `rw
  [Adjunction.homEquiv_apply]`, `congr 1` (closes by `rfl` since `Оҙ = Ој.inv` via `oplaxMonoidal_Оҙ_eq` + `Оө =
  counit`). Light вҖ” lives in the presheaf (single comp-instance), NOT the dual-instance regime. **STILL GATED:**
  graded `mul_assoc` = `О“(tensorPowAdd.hom)вҲҳsectionsMul`; the lax `associativity` law discharges the `Ој`-pentagon
  but `tensorPowAdd` is built recursively from the hand `tensorObjAssoc`, so `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (`hM`) STILL
  needs the dual-instance pentagon wall `tensorObjAssoc_eq_localized` (L2397, DO-NOT-TOUCH). The lax law does NOT
  bypass it (separate reindexing pentagon, one layer down). Next route: faithfulness of `toPresheafOfModules`
  (it is `Faithful`) вҶ’ reduce `hM` to a presheaf-morphism identity in ONE comp-instance, assemble from
  `LaxMonoidal.associativity` + the proven bridges (`tensorObjUnitIso_eq_localizedLeftUnitor`,
  `tensorBraiding_eq_localizedBraiding`, `sectionsMul_eq_laxTensorator`) + `Ој_natural_left/right`.
- **FBC Route B: full faithfulness of `tilde` reduces the ring-square crux to ONE clean `ModuleCat` identity
  (iter-030, axiom-free cold-green).** For an iso-equality of `tilde`-image morphisms (`Source вү… tilde Q`,
  both sides `tilde P вҹ¶ tilde Q`): `apply Iso.ext`; `simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom,
  Category.assoc, tilde.functor_obj]` вҖ” `tilde.functor_obj` is NECESSARY to unify `tilde X` vs `(tilde.functor
  _).obj X` so the next rewrite fires; `rw [вҶҗ Iso.inv_comp_eq]` (lands `tilde P вҹ¶ tilde Q`); `refine Eq.trans
  (tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor.map_preimage _).symm (congrArg _ ?_)` вҖ” defeq-TOLERANT (`refine`/`exact`, NOT
  `rw`: goal carries `tilde X`, `map_preimage` produces `(tilde.functor _).obj X`). Cancel the trailing
  dictionary at the ISO level (`have h3 := by rw [вҶҗ goal2]; simp`), NOT the `.hom` level вҖ” `.hom`-level
  `cancel_mono pIR'.hom` whnf-TIMES-OUT @300s (the `tilde X` vs `(tilde.functor _).obj X` mismatch makes
  `Iso.inv_hom_id` not fire). Residual = the genuine Stacks-01I9 part-(1) cocycle (geometric reindex of
  iterated base-change pullback = algebraic reassoc). BOTH closing routes DEAD: element via `ModuleCat.hom_ext`
  forces `О“`-of-`pullbackComp` (per-decl kernel-bomb); mate route = the dead fold Г—3. Route B reaches the SAME
  irreducible content as Route A but isolates it cleanly. Crux frontier STUCK ~10 iters (0 sorry-elim);
  iter-031 = re-scope the seed, NOT a Route-A/fold variant.
- **`CatCommSq.vComp` defeats the FBC functor-level glue STATEMENT wall (iter-029, DECISIVE вҖ” breaks the
  iter-024 blocker).** When a functor-level coherence glue between two routings of a ring square won't even
  ELABORATE because an `isoWhiskerRight reassocNat (tilde.functor _)` reassoc seam whnf-bombs inside a 4-fold
  `вүӘвү«` telescope: assemble each routing as a `CatCommSq.vComp` paste of the dictionary `CatCommSq`s, whose
  codomain is ALREADY `(ext f вӢҷ ext g) вӢҷ tilde` вҖ” so the reassoc adjacency is SYNTACTIC and the statement
  elaborates bomb-free. Recipe (all cold-green, FlatBaseChange.lean ~L2287вҖ“2355): (a) dictionary as a
  `CatCommSq` (`def pullbackSpecTildeCatCommSq ПҶ := вҹЁpullbackSpecTildeNatIso ПҶвҹ©`); (b) the paste as a
  SEMIREDUCIBLE `def вҖҰ : Iso вҖҰ` returning the iso (NOT the class вҖ” class-typed `letI`/`haveI`/`instance` all
  fail: `instance` synth doesn't fire, `letI`вҶ’transparentвҶ’vComp statement bombs, `haveI`вҶ’opaque `d.iso` won't
  reduce), built `@CatCommSq.vComp _Г—12 вҖҰ (catCommSq f) (catCommSq g)` (positional `@`, vComp instance args are
  anonymous); (c) its component via `simp only [theDef, CatCommSq.vComp_iso_hom_app]; rfl`. Bridge an object-def
  comparison to its `вҖҰNat.app (tilde M)` form by `rfl` AT THE ISO LEVEL (heavy вүҲ61s but fits 200000hb; the
  `.hom`-level `rfl` is the kernel-unsafe iter-021 wall вҖ” see `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_eq_natApp`).
  This SUPERSEDES the dead abstract-`вүӘвү«`-fold cocycle family (all 3 sub-routes refuted iter-024/026/027).
- **Fast FBC feedback loop (reusable):** a throwaway `scratch.lean` that `import`s the built `.olean` and is
  checked with `lake env lean scratch.lean` (вүҲ8вҖ“18s) DOES surface `(kernel) deterministic timeout` вҖ” unlike the
  full-file LSP (times out >30s AND hides kernel timeouts). Use it for budget/defeq probing before editing.
- **SNAP section route: pentagon-avoidance is carried ENTIRELY by the П„-flattening, NOT by `assoc_core`
  (iter-028, DECISIVE).** Reducing `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` the *natural* way вҖ” commute the comparison Ој
  out of both `sectionsMul`s via the whiskering bricks, then `вҶҗ sectionMul_assoc_core` to reassociate
  through the SHEAF associator Оұ вҖ” provably lands on the off-path object-level pentagon
  (`hM == tensorPowAdd_assoc` rearranged). The blueprint's "no object-level pentagon" claim is correct
  ONLY for the `muGamma_collapse` route, which flattens each degreewise product to a `О“(О·)`-image of a
  *presheaf* tensor power (`tensorPowPsh`/`tensorPowComparison`, both landed sorry-free iter-028) BEFORE
  reassociating, so bracketing-independence becomes the concrete `TensorProduct.assoc`. вҮ’ any reduction
  that reassociates at the sheaf level re-summons the dead pentagon; the flattening must precede it. The
  still-missing crux = `П„_{m,m'} : О“(L^m)вҠ—О“(L^m')вҶ’О“(P^{m+m'})` вҖ” NOT a plain concatenation (`О“(L^m)вү О“(L)^вҠ—m`)
  nor О·-inverse-derived (О· has no section-level inverse); design it with the analogist before prover budget.
  Do NOT close `hM` by citing `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (resurrects a dead off-path decl into the live cone).
- **SNAP `sectionsMul`-whiskering naturality bricks close by `exact вҖҰsymm` (defeq), NOT `rw` (iter-028,
  both landed sorry-free).** `sectionsMul_whiskerRight/Left` ARE pure unit-naturality of `О·` against the
  presheaf whiskering `fвҷӯв–·Bвҷӯ`: body `(sheafification_map_unit_top (whiskerRight/Left вҖҰ) (aвҠ—b)).symm`. `rw`
  FAILS ("did not find pattern") вҖ” the goal carries `sectionsMul` form, the lemma the unit form, defeq-but-
  not-syntactic; `exact вҖҰsymm` closes by defeq. Phrasing the transported factor as `(f.val.app вҠӨ).hom a`
  (= `(toPresheafOfModules X).map f`, rfl-bridged) makes the brick `rw`-match the downstream `О“(Ој)` form in
  the assoc reduction. The feared Ој-boundary whnf bomb did NOT trigger вҖ” the bricks fire cleanly.
- **The eqToIso boundary-bridge FOLD also fails вҖ” RELOCATES but cannot ELIMINATE the compounded boundary
  defeq (iter-027 REFUTES, closing the fold family).** Cure attempted for the iter-026 fold bomb: interpose
  an `eqToIso eбөў` at each telescope boundary so adjacency is syntactic and each boundary identity is an
  isolated obligation (`ring_square_cocycle`, a bare 6-iso + 6-`eqToIso`-bridge carrier-free skeleton).
  TWO branches, both dead by cold build / LSP: (1) **inline `rfl` bridges** вҖ” building `have key` ACCUMULATES
  all boundary defeqs + heavy-iso elaborations into ONE per-declaration budget and bombs (`(kernel)
  deterministic timeout at isDefEq` @L2258 for 6 bridges; @L2249 at the `qincl` arg when an end boundary is
  left unbridged). Splitting `rfl`s into separate `have`s does NOT help вҖ” heartbeat budget is per-DECLARATION,
  not per-tactic; `maxHeartbeats 1e6` forbidden. (2) **pre-proven fvar boundary lemmas** (own budget each) вҖ”
  `key` builds cheaply BUT the bridges are UN-collapsible: `simp [eqToIso_refl, Iso.refl_trans]` is a NO-OP on
  a defeq-not-syntactic fvar boundary `e : objA = objB` (objA вүў_syn objB), because `eqToIso_refl` fires only
  on a syntactic `X = X` and no Mathlib lemma collapses `eqToIso (h : objA=objB)` for objA вү  objB syntactically
  (target object ambiguous). Reconciling the bridged `key` with the unbridged goal then forces the boundary
  whnf back, compounded, at the final `exact`. вҮ’ the abstract-cocycle FOLD is now refuted on all three
  sub-routes (carrier-bearing iter-024, carrier-free iter-026, eqToIso-bridge iter-027). The structural escape
  must AVOID the object-level `вүӘвү«` telescope entirely: iter-028 = `CategoryTheory.CatCommSq.hComp` functor-level
  paste (legs as `CatCommSq` instances, `hComp`/`vComp`, `.app M` extracted ONCE via `congrArg (В·.hom.app M)`),
  whose composition adjacency is the shared FUNCTOR matched by `Functor.comp` congruence вҖ” no heavy OBJECT defeq.

- **`exact <abstract-lemma> <heavy-carriersвҖҰ>` does NOT dodge a whnf bomb (iter-026 REFUTES the iter-025
  conjecture below).** The iter-026 probe tested exactly this: a fully carrier-free cocycle skeleton
  `ring_square_cocycle_probe` (`{рқ’ө}[Category рқ’ө]{X1..X6}`, six Isos, `sorry` body) folded into the heavy FBC glue
  via `exact ring_square_cocycle_probe (chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison вҖҰ) вҖҰ`. Cold build вҶ’ whnf 200k-hb timeout
  at the FOLD seam (FlatBaseChange.lean:2235), build RED. ROOT CAUSE: the `exact`-binds-carriers-to-metavars premise
  is FALSE вҖ” unification of the abstract conclusion against the CONCRETE goal still forces whnf of the GOAL side
  whenever the goal is not already syntactically in the lemma's conclusion shape (here the concrete RHS last factor
  is `pullback_spec_tilde_iso вҖҰ`, not syntactically `_.symm`, so the kernel reduces to test the shape).
  Carrier-abstraction helps the lemma's PROOF; it never helps the FOLD's unification. To use a cocycle fold the goal
  must FIRST be made SYNTACTICALLY a cocycle instance (all legs one shape, no defeq-not-syntactic mismatch) вҖ” which
  is the original wall. вҶ’ the iso/functor-level FBC ring-square glue is STUCK on both sub-routes (carrier-bearing
  iter-024, carrier-free iter-026); pivot to a pointwise sheaf-free proof or a syntactic re-shape.
- **(iter-025 conjecture, NOW REFUTED вҖ” see above) Escape a carrier-whnf kernel bomb by ABSTRACTING the carrier
  out of the statement, then `exact`.**
  When a coherence equation between composites over a heavy carrier (`tilde` sheafification, `pullback (Spec _)`,
  `extendScalars`) is well-typed but over-budget (elaborates @800k-hb, bombs @200k-hb; `maxHeartbeats` forbidden),
  the term is fine вҖ” every TACTIC that forces a defeq across the carrier (`simp`/`rw`/`congr`/`congrArg (Iso.app В·)`)
  is what bombs (motive re-check over the carrier). The PROPOSED fix (abstract cocycle, prove by mate calculus, close
  with a SINGLE `exact cocycle вҖҰ hyps`) was conjectured kernel-light because unification was thought to BIND the
  carriers to metavars without reducing them вҖ” **iter-026 cold-build refuted this** (the fold whnf-bombs anyway).
  Still-valid residue: the closed Iso-level telescoping primitives Mathlib LACKS вҖ” `conjugateIsoEquiv_comp` /
  `conjugateIsoEquiv_symm_comp` (project-side, iter-025, carrier-free, `Iso.ext`+`conjugateIsoEquiv_apply_hom`+
  `conjugateEquiv_comp`); the COLD `lake build`-only test discipline (LSP/`lean_run_code` hide the timeout); and the
  real Mathlib mate API (`Adjunction.Mates`: `mateEquiv_vcomp`/`_hcomp`, `iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv`;
  `CatCommSq.hComp`) вҖ” usable for a cocycle's PROOF, just not for a carrier-dodging fold.

- **Make an object-def's `.app (tilde M)` fold SYNTACTIC by re-basing the def body on its `вҖҰNat.app (tilde M)`
  form (iter-024 `fbc-geom-reorder`, landed cold-green).** When an object-level comparison `comparison M` is
  the distributed three-factor `вүӘвү«` of an `.app (tilde M)` over a functor-level nat-iso, folding it against
  the nat form forces a defeq over `pullback (Spec _).obj (tilde M)` вҶ’ sheafification whnf kernel bomb.
  FIX (plan-phase refactor, NOT a prover): reorder the functor-level `comparisonNat` (+ its deps) BEFORE the
  object def, then redefine the object def body as `exact (comparisonNat ПҲ ПҶ ПҒ).app (tilde M)` (same type,
  defeq to the distributed form; all existing statement/`exact`-delegation uses are defeq-tolerant). The fold
  then closes by `rfl`/defeq on that leg. CAVEAT (iter-024): this only fixes ONE leg вҖ” a glue with multiple
  legs crossing `.obj (tilde M)` needs EVERY leg re-based, else the un-rebased legs still whnf-bomb (the
  three non-geom `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso` legs were the residual wall). Companion kernel-safe bridge for
  `extendScalars`-carrier (no sheafification) legs: `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_eq_natApp` (`congr 1` close).

- **FBC mate-leg at NAT-TRANS level = hom-level reading of a CLOSED Iso mate leg (iter-023, CLOSED
  `ring_square_glue_geom_leg_nat` + `ring_square_glue_alg_leg_nat` cold-green, axiom-clean; CORRECTS iter-022's
  "leg-nat lemmas not independently closable" claim).** To state the natural-transformation form of a mate
  coherence consumed by a telescope, do NOT chase the blueprint's abstract `vcomp`-phrasing
  (`conjugateEquiv_mateEquiv_vcomp` / `mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv_vcomp`). State it as the **hom-level
  `conjugateEquiv` reading of the already-closed Iso-level mate leg** and close in 3 lines:
  `have h := congrArg Iso.hom (<closed_Iso_mate_lemma> вҖҰ); rw [conjugateIsoEquiv_apply_hom] at h; exact h`
  (`conjugateIsoEquiv` is `@[simps]` вҮ’ `conjugateIsoEquiv_apply_hom : (conjugateIsoEquiv adjвӮҒ adjвӮӮ Оұ).hom =
  conjugateEquiv adjвӮҒ adjвӮӮ Оұ.hom`). KERNEL-LIGHT: no component evaluated, no `tilde M` carrier whnf. Same recipe
  for geom (`chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_mate`) and alg (`chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_extendScalarsComp`)
  legs. Companion functor-level dictionary: `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso := conjugateIsoEquiv.symm
  (gammaPushforwardNatIso ПҶ)` with `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso_app : (вҖҰ).app M = pullback_spec_tilde_iso ПҶ M := rfl`.

- **FBC iterated-mate LINCHPIN via `iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv` specialization (iter-022, CLOSED
  `ring_square_glue_pst_iterated_mate` cold-green + axiom-clean).** The conjugate of a TwoSquare over a
  BINARY composite adjunction equals the iterated single-step mate: `conjugateEquiv adjL adjR Оұ =
  ((mateEquiv adjвӮ„ вҖҰ) ((mateEquiv adjвӮҒ вҖҰ) Оұ)).natTrans`, closed simply as
  `(iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv adjвӮҒ adjвӮӮ adjвӮғ adjвӮ„ Оұ).symm`. Adjunction matching MUST be verified:
  here `adjвӮҒ = tilde.adjunction R`, `adjвӮӮ = tilde.adjunction R'`, `adjвӮғ = extendRestrictScalarsAdj ПҶ.hom`,
  `adjвӮ„ = pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (Spec.map ПҶ)`, with `adjвӮҒ.comp adjвӮ„ = adjL`, `adjвӮғ.comp adjвӮӮ = adjR`.
  CONFIRMED REAL (`Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Adjunction/Mates.lean` L450,456, pinned b80f227):
  `iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv` + inverse companion `iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv_symm` (the tool
  for a RIGHT-adjoint square, e.g. `gammaPushforwardNatIso`) + `conjugateEquiv_symm_comp` (telescope fusion)
  + the TwoSquare-valued `conjugateEquiv_mateEquiv_vcomp` / `mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv_vcomp` (whiskerings are
  `TwoSquare.whiskerLeft/Right/Top/Bottom` pastings, NOT `Functor.whisker*`; recover NatTrans via `.natTrans`
  / `TwoSquare.equivNatTrans`). Definitional whisker-app folds: `H.map (ОҰ.app M) = (Functor.whiskerRight ОҰ H).app M`
  and `ОҰ.app (F.obj M) = (Functor.whiskerLeft F ОҰ).app M`, both `:= rfl` вҖ” name is `Functor.whiskerRight`/
  `Functor.whiskerLeft`, NOT `CategoryTheory.whiskerRight` (unknown identifier in this toolchain). This is the
  decomposition engine for the remaining four-leg natTrans telescope (`ring_square_glue_natTrans`) that gates
  the glue.
- **SNAP unitor bridge over the localized-monoidal boundary вҖ” `tensorObjUnitIso_eq_localizedLeftUnitor`
  (iter-021, CLOSED sorry-free, cold-green, axiom-clean; the leandag-READY net-progress bridge NOT gated on
  the blocked associator).** To prove `(hand-built unitor iso) = (object iso) вү« (localized О»^loc)` between the
  `modulesLocalizedMonoidal X` synonym and the `LocalizedMonoidal` comp-instance: `apply Iso.ext`; `symm; rw
  [вҶҗ Iso.eq_inv_comp]` isolate the localized unitor; `cancel_epi (рқҹҷ в—Ғ c_G)`; **`erw [MonoidalCategory.leftUnitor_naturality]`**
  to bridge `unitModule X` vs `рқҹҷ_` and reduce a GENERAL object `G` to `L'Gвҷӯ` along the counit `c_G` (REQUIRED вҖ”
  `Localization.Monoidal.leftUnitor_hom_app`/`rightUnitor_hom_app` fire ONLY at `(L').obj _`); then `rw
  [leftUnitor_hom_app]`; collapse the `c_G`/`c_GвҒ»В№` pair via `вҶҗ id_tensorHom` + **`erw [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom_assoc]`**
  + `Iso.hom_inv_id` + `tensorHom_id`; `rfl` closes the light residual (`toMonoidalCategory=sheafification`,
  `рқҹҷ_psh=(unitModule X)вҷӯ`, Ој object-args). **REUSABLE:** the `unitModule X`вҶ”`рқҹҷ_` token-divergence AND the
  `modulesLocalizedMonoidal`вҶ”`LocalizedMonoidal` comp-instance divergence BOTH block `rw`/`cancel_epi`/`Category.assoc`
  EXACTLY like the Ој-divergence; **`erw` bridges both**, and the final assoc/object residual closes by plain `rfl`
  because the goal is LIGHT (no deep Ој nesting вҖ” contrast the associator wall). `MonoidalCategory.braiding_leftUnitor
  (X) : (ОІ_ X рқҹҷ).hom вү« (О»_ X).hom = (ПҒ_ X).hom` is REAL вҖ” the key for the right-unitor bridge.
- **FBC mate-leg engine вҖ” `вҶҗ conjugateEquiv_comp` split over per-piece coherences (iter-018, CLOSED BOTH b2
  mate legs `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_mate` + `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_extendScalarsComp`
  cold-green + axiom-clean, review-verified sorryAx-free).** To prove a 3-factor mate identity
  `conjugateEquiv(comparison).hom = pushforward/restrict composite`: (1) `apply Iso.ext; rw
  [conjugateIsoEquiv_apply_hom]`; (2) **KEY unfold** `simp only [<the Nat defs>, eq_mpr_eq_cast, cast_eq,
  Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom (, eqToIso.hom)]` вҖ” **`eq_mpr_eq_cast, cast_eq` DISSOLVE the `letI : Algebra вҖҰ`-
  induced `Eq.mpr` casts** that were the iter-011..017 "cast blocker" (they vanish under these simp lemmas, NOT
  a residual cast to strip); (3) `set` the ring maps + composite/midpoint adjunctions; (4) split the right-assoc
  conjugate with `вҶҗ CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv_comp` (Г—2, midpoints supplied EXPLICITLY); (5) discharge
  per-factor by the REAL per-piece coherences вҖ” geom: `Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` (REAL
  Mathlib, Sheaf.lean:238, @[simp]); alg: `conjugateEquiv_extendScalarsComp` (iter-017) вҖ” plus a tiny congruence
  helper (`conjugateEquiv_pullbackCongr` / `conjugateEquiv_extendScalars_eqToHom`, latter needs `h` supplied
  explicitly since bare `rw` can't infer the Prop) + an inverted `f3` iso-calc. **TRAP (algebraic leg): you MUST
  re-declare the three `letI : Algebra вҖҰ` instances at the proof head or `includeLeftRingHom`'s `(R:=)(A:=)(B:=)`
